---
title: Leaflet
subtitle: A quarto shortcode extension to add interactive Leaflet maps
leaflet:
  demo:
    center: [48.8584, 2.2945]
    zoom: 13
    height: "400px"
    markers:
      - position: [48.8584, 2.2945]
        popup: "<b>Eiffel Tower</b>"
        tooltip: "Eiffel Tower"
format:
  html:
    title-block-banner: true
---

A Quarto shortcode extension to embed interactive [Leaflet](https://leafletjs.com/) maps in **HTML** and **revealjs** formats.

{{< leaflet demo >}}

## Features

- 🗺️ Interactive maps with OpenStreetMap tiles (or any custom tile provider)
- 📍 Markers with popups, tooltips, and custom icons
- 🎨 Bootstrap Icons and FontAwesome icon support for markers
- 🔧 Arbitrary Leaflet options passthrough — any `L.map()` option just works
- 📝 Two input modes: YAML metadata or inline shortcode arguments

## Install

- Requires Quarto >= 1.4.0
- In the root of the quarto project, run in terminal:

  ```bash
  quarto add royfrancis/quarto-leaflet
  ```

This will install the extension under the `_extensions` subdirectory. See the [Usage](usage.html) page for details. See the repo [README](https://github.com/royfrancis/quarto-leaflet) for full list of arguments.
